title: Add RuleName and Extent to JUnit XML output
description: Implement issue #13: add RuleName and Extent fields from PSSA DiagnosticRecord to JUnit XML failure output. Modify 3 source files (ConvertTo-PSSAJunitXml.ps1, ConvertTo-JunitXml.ps1, Get-TestCaseXml.ps1) and update tests per specs/issue-13-add-rulename.md. Acceptance: all unit and integration tests pass, XML output contains RULE: and Extent: lines.
